nasb.text: I was forty years old when Moses the servant of the Lord sent me from Kadesh-barnea to spy out the land, and I brought word back to him as it was in my heart.

esv.text: I was forty years old when Moses the servant of the Lord  sent me from Kadesh-barnea to spy out the land, and I brought him word again as it was in my heart.

cnv.text: 耶和華的僕人摩西從加低斯．巴尼亞派我去窺探這地的時候，我正四十歲；我照著我心裡所想的向他報告。

ccb.text: 我四十岁那年，耶和华的仆人摩西从加低斯·巴尼亚派我来侦察这地方，我如实禀告他。
